articles.title: Solana is up 95% in December — But why are AVAX, INJ, NEAR surging even higher?
articles.description: Solana now ranks as the fourth-largest cryptocurrency by market cap yet trails behind its main Layer 1 blockchain rivals in December price growth.

articles.title: Solana’s resilience amidst the price downturn
articles.description: Prominent cryptocurrency maximalist and commentator Max Keiser, recently took to Twitter to express his reservations about Solana (SOL), hinting at the possibility of a “rug pull.” While Keiser’s statement reflects the skepticism shared by Bitcoin enthusiasts towards projects like Solana, it’s important to delve deeper into the context of Solana’s recent price movements and the […]
